benefits.description: Crushed PRs for almost every exercise in heavy lifting sessions
Tennis elbow pain starting to improve; was at point where unable to continue gym due to pain

side_effects.description: 14 injections per week in tender elbow area may become problematic long-term

protocol_notes: Local injection near inside of elbow. Uses 30g insulin needle. Injecting near problem area based on research supporting stomach injections also work. Uses chip clip technique to pinch skin before injection. Considering rotating to outer elbow and shoulder area due to injection frequency.
